The team then tests the combination of strains that is included in one Omni-Biotic probiotic formulation to make sure they work well together to achieve a desired outcome. All Omni-Biotic probiotics are tested for efficacy in their final version in clinical studies. Key clinical studies using Omni-Biotic can be found in the Research / Education website section.

Our products are developed by Institut AllergoSan in accordance with the highest quality criteria for probiotics presented by the FDA, World Health Organization (WHO), World Gastroenterology Organization (WGO), and Austrian/German Societies for Probiotic Medicine (OePROM / DePROM).

results.title: Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids Probiotic
results.raw_content:
Omni- Biotic AB 10 Kids can also be taken once daily for ongoing digestive support.

Do not exceed daily recommended dose. Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids is best taken on an empty stomach.

 1. Stir one sachet of Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids in approximately 4 ounces/125 mL of room temperature water or other non-acidic liquid (dairy and dairy alternative milk or yoghurt, apple juice).

 2. Wait 1 minute for probiotic activation.

3. Stir again and let your child enjoy!

If taking antibiotics, separate probiotic  
 consumption from medication by 1 hour for best results.

## Composition

Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids contains 10 deeply studied probiotic strains in a gentle, half-dose formula compared to the original Omni-Biotic AB 10 Probiotic: [...] Taking Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids during antibiotic treatment is very beneficial for your child. Timing is important though. When taking antibiotics, it is recommended to take Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids at least one (1) hour away from the antibiotic for optimal efficacy.

#### What Are The Probiotic Strains Included In Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids?

Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids contains 10 specially selected, scientifically tested, well-characterized probiotic strains:

Lactobacillus acidophilus W55  
Lactobacillus acidophilus W37  
Lactobacillus plantarum W1  
Bifidobacterium lactis W51  
Enterococcus faecium W54  
Lactobacillus paracasei W20  
Lactobacillus rhamnosus W71  
Lactobacillus salivarius W24  
Lactobacillus plantarum W62  
Bifidobacterium bifidum W23 [...] Improves bacterial diversity in gut

Reduces antibiotic-associated diarrhea (AAD)

Supports immune function

 

## Relevant Clinical Studies

Clinical studies from leading research centers, universities, and hospitals using the final formulation of Omni-Biotic AB 10.   
  
Disclaimer: The clinical studies featured here were conducted on the original, full-dose Omni-Biotic formulations. Omni-Biotic Kids provides the same carefully selected probiotic strains in an age-appropriate half dose for children.

CLINICAL STUDY #1

Use of a multi-species probiotic for the prevention of antibiotic-associated diarrhea

Published: 2010

Findings Include:

 Significantly reduce antibiotic-associated diarrhea
 Help fight unwanted, pathogenic bacteria such as C. Diff

Read full study

CLINICAL STUDY #2 [...] ## Benefits

 Supports gut microbiome balance and function, especially during and after antibiotic intake
 Restores and maintains a diverse and balanced gut flora
 Includes the same 10 deeply studied probiotic strains as Omni-Biotic AB 10 in a kid-friendly, half dose powder for easy use

\These statements have not been evaluated by the Food and Drug Administration. This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

## Recommended Use

Infants & toddlers (up to 3 years): Take 1 sachet twice daily during antibiotic use. After completing antibiotics, continue with 1 sachet daily for 10-14 days.

Children (ages 3-6): Take 1-2 sachets twice daily during antibiotic use. After completing antibiotics,  
 continue with1 sachet once or twice daily for 10-14 days. [...] #### Why Are There Other Ingredients In Addition To The Probiotics In Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids?

The other ingredients included in Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids , such as corn starch or maltodextrin are specifically added to improve the delivery of the probiotic bacteria to the intestines. A small amount of corn starch serves as the carrier. The maltodextrin is a prebiotic nutrient that serves as the food for the probiotics. When the powder is dissolved in liquid, the probiotics can hydrate and consume these specialized nutrients, and become strong for their passage through the digestive tract to the intestines where they will be most effective.

#### How Many Colony Forming Units (CFU) Are In Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids?

Omni-Biotic AB 10 Kids contains 2.5 billion CFU per serving / sachet.

Omni-Biotic Cat & Dog probiotic for digestive support

Omni-Biotic Cat & Dog probiotics for pet health [...] PROBIOTIC SUPPLEMENT FOR CATS AND DOGS

Maintaining a balanced gut microbiome is essential for the overall health and longevity of cats and dogs. The beneficial bacteria in their gut support digestion, nutrient absorption, and immune function, while also producing important compounds that nourish and protect the intestinal mucosa and barrier. However, gut imbalances, pathogens, and stress can lead to common digestive issues like diarrhea and vomiting. Omni-Biotic Cat & Dog is a highly effective probiotic designed specifically to stabilize your pet's gut flora, support digestion, and enhance overall well-being with scientifically selected strains and a high count of viable bacteria, all in a convenient, flavorless powder.

Supports pet’s gut flora   
 and digestion [...] ## Benefits

 Supports a balanced and diverse gut flora for optimal digestion and well-being
 Relieves occasional digestive issues
 Includes scientifically selected probiotic strains shown to improve animal health
 Powder probiotic is easy to mix into dry or wet food

## Recommended Use

Omni-Biotic Cat & Dog is suitable for cats and dogs of all ages and breeds. Mix the powder into their food (dry or wet) and, if necessary, add a little bit of water. The amount of powder depends on the cat or dog’s body weight, based on the following guidelines: [...] #### How were the probiotic strains in Omni-Biotic Cat & Dog chosen?

Omni-Biotic Caricol for digestive wellness [...] #### How should I take Caricol?

It is recommended to take Caricol after meals for optimal digestive support. Follow the dosage instructions on the packaging.

#### Can I use Caricol with other medications?

While Caricol is a dietary supplement that can help provide natural relief for constipation, gas and bloating, it's best to consult a healthcare professional to check for any potential interactions with other medications.

#### Is Caricol suitable for babies/children?

Yes, Caricol can be given to babies as soon as they can eat baby food (usually after 6 months) in a dosage of ⅓ or ½ Stick per day. But it’s advisable to consult a pediatrician for the correct dosage.

#### Is Caricol gluten-free?

Gastritis, or inflammation of the stomach lining, causes many of these same issues. Proton pump inhibitors (PPIs) and other medications are often used to manage gastritis symptoms. Unfortunately, long-term use may negatively affect the gut microbiome and overall wellbeing. That's why many seek natural remedies for gastritis.

Caricol Gastro was formulated specifically for those seeking natural relief for acid refluxand gastritis. Caricol Gastro combines papaya extract with oats — powerhouse ingredients known for providing natural heartburn relief and soothing inflammation of the stomach lining.

Caricol's patented preparation process releases unique nutrients from the oats and papaya that nourish, strengthen, and protect gastric mucosa, supporting digestive comfort and health. [...] Omni-Biotic

## Recommended Use

Take Caricol Gastro once or twice daily before meals, or as directed by a healthcare practitioner.

Outcomes: [...] #### Are there any clinical studies with Caricol Gastro?

Yes, there are several studies with Caricol Gastro. For example, this publication investigated its effectiveness as one of the natural remedies for gastritis. The researchers found a statistically significant reduction in pain associated with gastritis in the group that took Caricol Gastro, compared to the placebo group. In a separate laboratory study, researchers showed that Caricol Gastro has the ability to calm inflamed stomach tissues by adhering to the mucosal lining, which in turn has protective and soothing effects.

#### Is Caricol Gastro suitable for children?

Caricol Gastro can be used by children, but it’s important to consult a pediatrician for the appropriate dosage.
